title: All products
prompt: Return all columns from the `products` table.

title: Cheap products
prompt: Return name and price of products that cost less than 50.
solution: SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE price < 50;

title: Belgian customers
prompt: Return name and city of customers from country 'BE'.
solution: SELECT name, city FROM customers WHERE country = 'BE';

title: Missing email
prompt: Return names of customers with no email address.
solution: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE email IS NULL;

title: Most expensive first
prompt: Return name and price of all products, most expensive first.
solution: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC;

title: Order + customer
prompt: Return order id, order_date, and the customer name for every order.
solution: SELECT o.id, o.order_date, c.name FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id;

title: Products + category
prompt: Return product name and the category name for each product.
solution: SELECT p.name AS product, c.name AS category FROM products p JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id;

title: Customers without orders
prompt: Return the names of customers who have never placed an order.
solution: SELECT c.name FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.id IS NULL;

title: Number of customers
prompt: Return the total number of customers under alias `total`.
solution: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM customers;

title: Orders per customer
prompt: Return customer_id and order count (alias `n`) per customer.
solution: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS n FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id;

title: Average price per category
prompt: Return category_id and average product price (alias `avg_price`) per category.
solution: SELECT category_id, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM products GROUP BY category_id;

title: HAVING
prompt: Return countries that have more than 1 customer, with column `country` and `n`.
solution: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS n FROM customers GROUP BY country HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

title: Above-average price
prompt: Return products whose price is above the overall average price.
solution: SELECT name, price FROM products WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM products);

title: Self-join: manager
prompt: Return employee name and their manager's name (column `employee`, `manager`).
solution: SELECT e.name AS employee, m.name AS manager FROM employees e JOIN employees m ON m.id = e.manager_id;

title: Price bucket
prompt: Return product name and a `bucket` column: 'cheap' (<30), 'mid' (30-100), 'expensive' (>100).
solution: SELECT name, CASE WHEN price < 30 THEN 'cheap' WHEN price <= 100 THEN 'mid' ELSE 'expensive' END AS bucket FROM products;

title: UNION cities
prompt: Return distinct cities (single column `city`) where customers live (no duplicates).
solution: SELECT city FROM customers UNION SELECT city FROM customers;
